acceptance_criteria.criterion: New command commands/merge.md defines /furrow:merge with subphases: audit -> classify -> resolve-plan -> execute -> verify.

Audit phase: detects symlink-ification of protected files, overlapping commits between main and worktree, install-artifact additions, stale row/TODO references, common.sh syntax validity on both sides.
Classify phase: each worktree commit labeled safe / redundant-with-main / destructive / mixed. Output a machine-readable classification table (JSON + rendered markdown).

Protected-file policy formalized: schemas/merge-policy.yaml lists file globs that are (a) NEVER auto-merged (bin/alm, bin/rws, bin/sds, .claude/rules/*, bin/frw.d/lib/common.sh), (b) machine-mergeable via sort-by-id (seeds.jsonl, todos.yaml), (c) prefer-ours by default (install-artifact globs). Policy file is repo-tracked.
Resolve-plan phase: produces a written conflict resolution plan per the policy (human-readable markdown + machine JSON). Human approves or edits the plan — no auto-overwrite of protected files.
Execute phase: applies the approved plan via standard git merge with the planned resolutions; aborts cleanly on deviation from plan (diff verifier).
Post-merge verify: runs frw doctor, confirms no bin/ deletions, confirms all hooks parse, confirms seeds.jsonl/todos.yaml sort invariants hold, confirms frw rescue is still callable.

Script-guard hook heredoc false positive fixed: path-match logic ignores occurrences inside single-/double-quoted strings or heredocs (e.g., git commit messages mentioning frw.d/* no longer trip the guard). Regression test covers the prior failure modes.
Reintegration section (from worktree-reintegration-summary) consumed via its JSON schema as the primary handoff output when /furrow:merge lands — /furrow:merge is not free-form prose-parsing.

End-to-end test: a fixture repo with a simulated worktree (install-artifact contamination + feature commits + one protected-file conflict) runs through all five subphases; the produced plan, when applied, yields a clean main branch with hooks intact and doctor green.

seed_check.evidence: Seed exists and is not closed: furrow-b0f2 (status=reviewing)
